_comment: ICICI Lombard previous-insurer master, transcribed from the partner doc (dock boyz/ICICI/cv_out.txt 'Insurer Master' table). import-icici-master.ts fuzzy-matches each canonical InsurerMaster (FG-sourced) name to an entry here and writes ProviderInsurerCode(icici, providerCode=code). NOTE (UAT confirmation): the doc's Save-Quote sample sent PreviousInsurerCode='ICICI LOMBARD' (a name) while this table's Code column is short ('ICLB'). We store the short code; if UAT rejects it for rollover/OD, switch providerCode to the name. Previous-insurer is optional for a quote, so this rarely blocks pricing.
